steps.title: Add the two equations
steps.content:
The equations are
$$y=\frac{x}{5}+8$$
$$y=-\frac{x}{5}+30$$
Adding them eliminates the $x$ terms:
$$y+y=\frac{x}{5}+8-\frac{x}{5}+30$$

steps.title: Find the requested value
steps.content: Combine like terms: $$2y=38$$ The question asks for $2y$, so no further solving is needed. The answer is D.
